sources.name: Open Fantasy Reference Corpus
sources.attribution: Data transformed and paraphrased for legal-safe compatibility.

monsters.name: Animated Armor
monsters.summary: A magically animated suit of armor that follows a fixed command without fear or fatigue.

monsters.name: Bandit
monsters.summary: A lightly armored outlaw that fights in groups and prefers ambushes over fair battles.

monsters.name: Bat, Giant
monsters.summary: A cave-dwelling predator that relies on flight and echo-guided attacks in darkness.

monsters.name: Centaur
monsters.summary: A woodland hunter with human and horse features, swift movement, and strong ranged skill.

monsters.name: Dryad
monsters.summary: A tree-bound spirit that protects sacred groves using allure and subtle woodland magic.

monsters.name: Dwarf
monsters.summary: A sturdy tunnel fighter known for discipline, stonecraft, and resistance to hardship.

monsters.name: Elemental, Air
monsters.summary: A living storm form that hurls foes and sweeps battlefields with powerful currents.

monsters.name: Elemental, Earth
monsters.summary: A mass of living stone that crushes through lines and ignores most fear effects.

monsters.name: Elf
monsters.summary: A graceful warrior-scholar blending swordcraft, stealth, and minor arcane talent.

monsters.name: Ghoul
monsters.summary: A corpse-eating undead that paralyzes prey and prowls graveyards or forgotten ruins.

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.summary: A small raider that relies on numbers, traps, and tight underground passages.

monsters.name: Golem, Clay
monsters.summary: A ritual-crafted guardian of hardened clay, relentless in carrying out magical orders.

monsters.name: Green Slime
monsters.summary: A clinging dungeon ooze that slowly consumes organic matter on contact.

monsters.name: Harpy
monsters.summary: A winged predator whose eerie song draws travelers toward dangerous heights.

monsters.name: Hydra
monsters.summary: A many-headed swamp beast that can strike several targets in quick succession.

monsters.name: Kobold
monsters.summary: A small tunnel-dweller known for traps, alarms, and harrying attacks.

monsters.name: Lizardfolk
monsters.summary: A marsh warrior adapted to wetlands, with durable scales and amphibious mobility.

monsters.name: Manticore
monsters.summary: A lion-bodied flyer with a venomous temperament and deadly ranged tail spikes.

monsters.name: Medusa
monsters.summary: A cursed being with a petrifying gaze and venomous serpentine hair.

monsters.name: Minotaur
monsters.summary: A maze-stalking brute with powerful charges and relentless pursuit instincts.

monsters.name: Ogre
monsters.summary: A hulking raider with brutal strength, poor discipline, and a taste for plunder.

monsters.name: Orc
monsters.summary: A warlike tribal humanoid that uses aggressive raids and rough battlefield tactics.

monsters.name: Rat, Giant
monsters.summary: A disease-bearing vermin swarm common in sewers, ruins, and grain stores.

monsters.name: Skeleton
monsters.summary: A reanimated bone soldier animated by dark magic and bound to simple commands.

monsters.name: Spider, Giant
monsters.summary: A stealthy predator with venomous fangs and web-laid lairs in dark places.

monsters.name: Treant
monsters.summary: An ancient tree guardian that protects forests and can animate nearby trees in defense.

monsters.name: Troll
monsters.summary: A vicious giant with rapid healing and long reach, feared in wild borderlands.

monsters.name: Wight
monsters.summary: A hateful undead spirit that drains vitality from the living with each strike.

monsters.name: Wolf
monsters.summary: A pack hunter that uses speed and teamwork to isolate and bring down prey.

monsters.name: Zombie
monsters.summary: A shambling undead corpse that obeys commands mindlessly and ignores pain.
